'?' : location.search;if (window.history && window.history.replaceState) {var ogU = location.pathname + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUQuery + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash;history.replaceState(null, null,"/rss.xml?__cf_chl_rt_tk=xAy5mo4ZufD50kA55OqNl0ssMhJ67q_rDfIwwtv22mE-1773660433-1.0.1.1-LqkZ.tVSELkWSJ5McPNA1Sf7..Lu354nmdv_sm_O7Zg"+ window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash);a.onload = function() {history.replaceState(null, null, ogU);}}document.getElementsByTagName('head')[0].appendChild(a);}());
